<insights>

- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected
- Perfect cohesion with 15 files suggests a well-designed client library with clear responsibilities
- Zero coupling indicates proper encapsulation and minimal external dependencies
- Comprehensive feature set covering API providers, authentication, CLI integration, and token usage monitoring
- Exemplary client library design with perfect cohesion and encapsulation
- Demonstrates adapter pattern with multiple providers (API, CLI) unified behind consistent interface
- Clean adapter pattern implementation allowing swappable Claude API providers while maintaining consistent client interface
- Token usage monitoring in token-usage.ts suggests this zone has dual responsibility as both client library and usage analytics service
- Auth module implements multiple authentication strategies but lacks clear strategy pattern interface documentation
- token-usage.ts mixing client concerns with analytics creates implicit service responsibility - consider extracting to dedicated analytics zone
